BlackSky Technology Inc. announced that on April 2, 2026, Senior Vice President, Controller, and Principal Accounting Officer Tracy Ward tendered her resignation, effective April 24, 2026, to pursue another opportunity, with the company stating her departure does not stem from any dispute or disagreement. Upon Ward’s departure, Chief Financial Officer and Principal Financial Officer Henry Dubois will assume the additional role of Principal Accounting Officer without any new compensatory arrangements, signaling continuity in the finance organization and a consolidation of senior financial oversight under a single executive.

data.title: Taoping Files Form 6-K Detailing Skyladder Acquisition and Pro Forma Financials
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Taoping ( (TAOP) ).

On April 7, 2026, Taoping filed a Form 6-K detailing its November 26, 2025 acquisition of Skyladder Group Limited, a Hong Kong holding company, and the resulting structure of downstream subsidiaries in Shenzhen and Tianjin. The filing clarifies that several Skyladder entities, including Shenzhen Smart Skyladder IoT and Tianjin Weida Elevator, were only combined under Skyladder Group after June 30, 2025 due to the later incorporation of intermediate holding company Skyladder Tianjin.

To support investors’ understanding of this reorganization, Taoping furnished audited and unaudited historical financial statements for Shenzhen Smart Skyladder and Tianjin Weida for 2023–2024 and the six months ended June 30, 2025, along with unaudited pro forma combined financials reflecting ownership of Skyladder Group and its subsidiaries. The pro forma data, presented for informational purposes, illustrates how the enlarged group’s financials might have looked had the entities been consolidated earlier, and these materials are now incorporated by reference into Taoping’s existing U.S. shelf and employee stock plan registration statements.

The most recent analyst rating on (TAOP) stock is a Hold with a $2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Taoping stock, see the TAOP Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TAOP Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TAOP is a Underperform.

The score is primarily weighed down by weak financial performance (declining revenue, ongoing losses, and negative cash flow). Technicals also reflect a strong downtrend (below key moving averages with negative MACD), with oversold indicators only modestly offsetting. Valuation is difficult to justify with a negative P/E and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on TAOP stock, click here.

More about Taoping

Taoping Inc., a China-based foreign private issuer listed in the U.S., operates through technology and IoT-focused subsidiaries, including newly acquired Hong Kong and mainland Chinese entities. Its portfolio now encompasses smart elevator and IoT-related operations concentrated in Shenzhen and Tianjin, positioning the group within China’s intelligent infrastructure and building-services ecosystem.

data.title: Outlook Therapeutics Pursues FDA Dispute Resolution for ONS-5010
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Outlook Therapeutics ( (OTLK) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 7, 2026, Outlook Therapeutics, Inc. announced it had submitted a formal dispute resolution request to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration following a December 30, 2025 Complete Response Letter for its Biologics License Application for ONS-5010/LYTENAVA™ for neovascular age-related macular degeneration. The FDA accepted the request and granted an April 2026 meeting with a deciding official, after the company held a Type A meeting on March 2, 2026 and compiled extensive clinical and safety data it believes support approval.

The company emphasized that ONS-5010/LYTENAVA™ showed clinically meaningful, statistically significant gains in visual acuity in its NORSE TWO Phase 3 trial, with additional supportive evidence from NORSE EIGHT and no safety concerns raised by the FDA to date. If ultimately approved in the U.S., ONS-5010/LYTENAVA™ would be the first FDA-approved ophthalmic bevacizumab formulation for retinal disease, potentially reshaping the treatment landscape and reinforcing Outlook Therapeutics’ bid to secure a differentiated regulatory and commercial position in the retina market.

The most recent analyst rating on (OTLK) stock is a Hold with a $0.19 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Outlook Therapeutics stock, see the OTLK Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on OTLK Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, OTLK is a Underperform.

The score is driven down primarily by very weak financials (large ongoing losses, negative equity, and heavy cash burn) and bearish technicals (price below major moving averages with negative MACD). Valuation provides limited support due to negative earnings and no dividend, while recent corporate events add further financing and listing-risk overhang despite some regulatory-engagement positives.

To see Spark’s full report on OTLK stock, click here.

More about Outlook Therapeutics

Outlook Therapeutics, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing ONS-5010/LYTENAVA™ (bevacizumab-vikg, bevacizumab gamma) to enhance the standard of care for bevacizumab in treating retinal diseases, particularly wet age-related macular degeneration. LYTENAVA™ is the first ophthalmic bevacizumab formulation to receive marketing authorization in the EU and UK, where the company has begun commercial launches in Germany, Austria, and the UK.

In the United States, ONS-5010/LYTENAVA™ remains investigational and, if approved, would become the first FDA-approved ophthalmic formulation of bevacizumab for retinal indications, including wet AMD. The product candidate is supported by a fully domestic, end-to-end U.S. manufacturing supply chain, positioning the company to serve the retina market with standardized manufacturing and pharmacovigilance infrastructure.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $20.99M

data.title: CervoMed Highlights Neflamapimod Progress in Lewy Body Dementia
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

CervoMed ( (CRVO) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 7, 2026, CervoMed announced that its representatives would present key aspects of the neflamapimod clinical program at the 2026 Lewy Body Dementia Association Annual Meeting in Atlanta, highlighting clinical findings, global regulatory alignment, and the finalized Phase 3 trial design in dementia with Lewy bodies (DLB). The company is also participating in an expert panel on biomarkers, emphasizing plasma GFAP as an early and treatment-responsive blood biomarker that correlates with cognitive decline and clinical progression in DLB.

The update includes new structural and functional MRI analyses from the Phase 2b RewinD-LB trial, which provide preliminary evidence that neflamapimod may reduce basal forebrain atrophy, a change linked to cognitive decline, and support MRI as a tool for assessing treatment effects in future DLB studies. Additional MRI data from DLB patients treated with neflamapimod will be presented on April 22, 2026, at the American Academy of Neurology Annual Meeting, reinforcing the drug’s potential to slow disease progression and underscoring CervoMed’s bid to establish neflamapimod as a foundational therapy in a disease area that currently lacks approved treatments in the U.S. and EU.

The most recent analyst rating on (CRVO) stock is a Buy with a $20.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CervoMed stock, see the CRVO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CRVO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CRVO is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by weak financial performance (no revenue, widening losses, and accelerating cash burn with declining equity), which increases funding risk. Technicals also reflect a sustained downtrend with weak momentum. Positive corporate developments around neflamapimod (formulation progress, biomarker-driven Phase 3 positioning, and platform trial inclusion) provide upside potential but do not offset the current financial and trend risks.

To see Spark’s full report on CRVO stock, click here.

More about CervoMed

CervoMed Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing treatments for age-related brain disorders. Its lead candidate, neflamapimod, is an oral small molecule that crosses the blood-brain barrier and selectively inhibits the alpha isoform of p38 MAP kinase to target neuroinflammation, synaptic dysfunction, and neurodegeneration.

Neflamapimod is being clinically developed for dementia with Lewy bodies (DLB), recovery after ischemic stroke, and primary progressive aphasia. Across Phase 1 and 2 trials in more than 800 participants, the drug has been generally well tolerated and shown signals of efficacy, with Phase 2 studies in DLB indicating improvements in dementia severity, functional mobility, and key biomarkers, especially in patients without Alzheimer’s disease co-pathology.

CervoMed’s recently completed Phase 2b RewinD-LB trial evaluated neflamapimod in DLB patients enriched for those without Alzheimer’s disease co-pathology. The company is positioning neflamapimod as a potential first approved treatment for DLB in major markets, reflecting a strategic focus on an indication with significant unmet medical need and no approved therapies in the U.S. or European Union.

Average Trading Volume: 87,177

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $36.85M

Learn more about CRVO stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Pampa Energía Revamps Board and Cuts Capital After AGM Resolutions
data.description:

An update from Pampa Energia SA ( (PAM) ) is now available.

On April 7, 2026, Pampa Energía’s shareholders approved several corporate governance changes at the company’s Annual General Meeting. The meeting re-elected Gustavo Mariani and Ricardo Alejandro Torres as regular directors and confirmed María Agustina Montes and Horacio Jorge Tomás Turri as alternate directors, all in non-independent roles, while appointing former executive Nicolás Aguzin as an independent regular director to replace Silvana Wasersztrom, with all mandates running through December 31, 2028.

The shareholders also approved a capital reduction of AR$19,920,279 via the cancellation of 19,920,279 treasury shares, equivalent to 1.46% of Pampa’s share capital, lowering stated capital from AR$1,363,520,380 to AR$1,343,600,101. This move tightens the company’s equity base and signals an effort to optimize capital structure and enhance capital efficiency, with potential implications for share metrics and minority investor interests in Argentina’s energy sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (PAM) stock is a Hold with a $96.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Pampa Energia SA stock, see the PAM Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PAM is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by solid fundamentals (re-accelerating growth, profitable operations, improving leverage) tempered by persistently negative free cash flow and planned heavy investment spend. Nutriband ( (NTRB) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On March 30, 2026, Nutriband Inc. announced it has chosen a commercial worldwide brand name candidate for its lead product, an abuse-deterrent fentanyl transdermal system, developed with branding specialist Brand Institute. The name and labeling are being submitted to regulators and for trademark protection, a key step toward commercialization of what could become the first abuse-deterrent fentanyl patch.

The product uses Nutriband’s AVERSA technology and is initially targeting the U.S. market, where peak annual sales are estimated between $80 million and $200 million, with development also planned for other major global markets. By investing in a distinct, regulator-vetted brand identity designed to reduce medication errors, Nutriband is advancing its late-stage asset and reinforcing its positioning in the pain-management segment focused on curbing opioid misuse.

The most recent analyst rating on (NTRB) stock is a Buy with a $15.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Nutriband stock, see the NTRB Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NTRB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NTRB is a Neutral.

Nutriband’s overall stock score is driven by a strong corporate event with positive market reception, offset by challenging financial performance and valuation issues. The technical analysis provides mixed signals, suggesting cautious optimism. The potential for shareholder value enhancement through recent corporate actions improves the score despite underlying financial weaknesses.

To see Spark’s full report on NTRB stock, click here.

More about Nutriband

Nutriband Inc., listed on Nasdaq, develops prescription transdermal pharmaceutical products, with a primary focus on its AVERSA abuse-deterrent transdermal technology. The company’s lead product under development is an abuse-deterrent fentanyl patch aimed at preventing abuse, diversion, misuse and accidental exposure of opioid and other high-risk drugs.

AVERSA technology can be incorporated into a wide range of transdermal patches to improve the safety profile of drugs with abuse potential while maintaining access for patients in need. The platform is supported by a broad international patent portfolio, with protections granted in major markets including the United States, Europe, Japan, Korea, Russia, China, Canada, Mexico and Australia.

Evotec AG ( (EVO) ) has issued an update.

On April 7, 2026, Evotec SE announced that its Supervisory Board has proposed industry veteran Dieter Weinand as Chairman of the Supervisory Board, with his election to be voted on at the Annual General Meeting scheduled for June 11, 2026. He is set to succeed Prof. Dr. Iris Löw-Friedrich as part of a planned succession, and will scale back other board roles to focus on steering Evotec’s transformation toward stronger commercial execution, strategic partnerships, and sustainable profitability.

On the same date, Evotec also disclosed that it expects to receive approximately $100 million in connection with the acquisition of Tubulis, a transaction that underscores the value of its partnering model and could bolster the company’s financial flexibility. Together, the leadership reshuffle and anticipated cash inflow highlight Evotec’s efforts to reinforce governance and balance sheet strength as it seeks to enhance its position in the pharmaceutical R&D ecosystem.

data.description:

  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Franco-Nevada ( (TSE:FNV) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Franco-Nevada reported that strong production growth and higher gold prices in 2025 drove record revenue, cash flow and earnings, supported by US$1.8 billion of acquisitions over the past two years and the ramp-up of new gold mines. The company increased its dividend for the 19th consecutive year, delivering an annualized 17% shareholder return since its 2007 IPO and ending 2025 with no debt and US$3.1 billion in available capital.

The company scheduled its 2026 annual and special meeting for May 12, 2026 in a hybrid virtual and in-person format to receive 2025 financial statements, elect directors, appoint auditors and hold an advisory vote on executive compensation. Founder and long-time leader David Harquail will not stand for re-election and will become Chair Emeritus, with current lead independent director Tom Albanese expected to be appointed independent non-executive chair, while management highlighted ongoing portfolio growth, potential upside from a possible Cobre Panamá restart, and an outlook for higher gold-equivalent output in 2026.

Franco-Nevada also underscored its strategy of backing strong operators through royalty and stream financing, citing recent deals with Sibanye, G Mining Ventures, Discovery Silver, Orezone Gold, i-80 Gold and Minerals 260 as evidence of the model’s effectiveness. The company emphasized its top-tier ESG ratings and inclusion in Corporate Knights’ Global 100 Most Sustainable Corporations for 2026 as it seeks to solidify its positioning as the preferred gold exposure for diversified investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:FNV) stock is a Buy with a C$352.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Franco-Nevada stock, see the TSE:FNV Stock Forecast page.

These strengths are partially tempered by a high P/E and modest dividend yield, plus earnings-call risks around cost/depletion pressure and uncertainty tied to Cobre Panama and certain true-ups.

To see Spark’s full report on FNV stock, click here.

More about Franco-Nevada

Franco-Nevada Corporation is a Canadian precious metals-focused royalty and streaming company listed on the TSX and NYSE under the ticker FNV. It provides financing to mining operators in exchange for royalties and streams, with a portfolio heavily weighted to gold but also exposed to platinum group metals and other commodities, positioning itself as a low-risk, asset-light way to invest in the mining sector.

The company targets long-life, high-quality projects globally and markets itself as the “go-to gold stock” for generalist investors, leveraging a large pipeline of over 300 development and exploration-stage royalties. Its business model emphasizes strong balance sheet management, no operating mine exposure, and alignment with operators that maintain high environmental and social standards, which has helped it gain strong ESG ratings and sustainability recognition.

data.title: Northwest Biotherapeutics Completes Advent BioServices Acquisition Deal
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Northwest Biotherapeutics ( (NWBO) ) has shared an update.

On October 24, 2025, Northwest Biotherapeutics, Inc. completed the acquisition of Advent BioServices Ltd., a U.K.-based CDMO that had been providing product development, manufacturing, cryostorage, and distribution services for the company’s DCVax immunotherapy platform. Advent became a wholly owned subsidiary, with consideration structured as approximately $1.9 million in purchase price plus about $8.3 million in settlement of pre-existing payables, payable in installments over two years with interest accruing at 7.5% on unpaid balances.

At closing, Northwest Biotherapeutics also recovered 12 million shares of its common stock and 5.5 million stock options previously issued to Advent as service compensation, retiring the shares to treasury and canceling the options, which reduces potential dilution for existing shareholders. The deal, a related-party transaction due to CEO Linda Powers’ control of the seller, was approved under the company’s related-party policies, and the company obtained a regulatory waiver allowing it not to provide certain historical and pro forma financial statements related to the acquisition.

More about Northwest Biotherapeutics

Northwest Biotherapeutics, Inc. is a biotechnology company focused on developing immunotherapy products, including its DCVax product platform, for the treatment of cancer. The company utilizes contract development and manufacturing services to support product development, manufacturing, cryostorage, and distribution of its DCVax portfolio, particularly its DCVax-L product candidate.

On April 7, 2026, Paramount Skydance amended its charter in Delaware to increase authorized Class B shares to 7 billion and allow Class B‑only dividends with Class A consent, bolstering flexibility to issue equity. The move underpins financing for its agreed February 27, 2026 cash acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery at $31 per share and supports a capital structure that preserves voting control with Class A holders.

To fund the WBD deal, PSKY arranged up to $46.97 billion of PIPE commitments led by the Ellison trust and RedBird, backed by an Ellison guarantee covering merger funding, fees and certain damages. Those investors have now syndicated the full equity commitments to a group including Middle Eastern sovereign wealth funds and LionTree via non‑voting Class B stock, broadening the shareholder base while leaving Ellison and RedBird in sole control of all voting shares.

In conjunction with the syndication, PSKY set a floating subscription price for new Class B shares between $12 and $16.02 based on a VWAP formula and scrapped a previously planned rights offering. Instead, all existing non‑affiliate Class B holders will receive listed, 10‑year Nasdaq‑traded warrants as a dividend, exercisable at the same syndication price and callable once the stock trades above $30, a structure the company says offers more tangible value and advances its goal of a wider public float.

The most recent analyst rating on (PSKY) stock is a Hold with a $9.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Paramount Skydance stock, see the PSKY Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PSKY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PSKY is a Neutral.

PSKY scores in the upper-mid range primarily because deteriorating profitability and rising leverage are significant fundamental risks despite improving free cash flow. The earnings call adds support via reaffirmed guidance and accelerating DTC/Paramount+ momentum, while technicals are mixed (stronger short-term trend but weaker long-term setup). Valuation is constrained by losses (negative P/E), and the large M&A-driven corporate event is a potential upside catalyst with material execution/regulatory risk.

To see Spark’s full report on PSKY stock, click here.

More about Paramount Skydance

Paramount Skydance Corporation is a U.S.-based media and entertainment company focused on film, television and streaming content, operating in highly competitive and dynamic global markets. The company derives revenues from content production, distribution, advertising and subscriptions, and is controlled through a dual‑class share structure in which Class A stock carries all voting rights.

data.title: Aphoenity International Delays Annual 10-K Filing
data.description:
Luduson G ( (LDSN) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Aphoenity International Holdings Inc. has notified regulators that it will be late filing its annual Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the year ended December 31, 2025. The notification was made via Form 12b-25, signaling a delay in the company’s required yearly disclosure to investors and the market.

The company attributes the delay primarily to the need for additional time for its independent registered public accounting firm to complete its review of the company’s interim financial statements. Management states that filing the Form 10-K (Yearly Report) on time would have required unreasonable effort and expense under the current circumstances.

Aphoenity has indicated that it expects to file the delayed Form 10-K (Yearly Report) within the standard 15-calendar-day extension period allowed under the rules. This suggests the company is targeting a relatively short postponement and aims to bring its reporting back on track quickly.

The company also disclosed that not all of its other required periodic reports over the past 12 months have been filed, with a specific reference to a prior report for June 30, 2025. However, it does not anticipate any significant change in results of operations compared with the prior fiscal year once the new earnings statements are filed.

Because the company does not expect material shifts in its operating results, it has not provided preliminary financial figures or detailed forecasts in this notice. Any forward-looking implications remain limited to expectations around timing of the filing and the assertion that results should be broadly consistent with the previous year.

Aphoenity emphasizes that it is working to complete the audit-related procedures and comply with its ongoing reporting obligations as a U.S.-listed issuer. The notification was signed on April 7, 2026, by Chief Executive Officer Chun Fong SIM, underscoring management’s formal commitment to resolve the delay and file the outstanding Form 10-K (Yearly Report).

More about Luduson G

Aphoenity International Holdings Inc., formerly known as Luduson G, is a Hong Kong–based company with its principal executive office in Wanchai. It is a U.S.-reporting issuer that files annual reports on Form 10-K (Yearly Report) and is subject to the periodic reporting requirements of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $619.8K

Learn more about LDSN stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Bluejay Nears Completion of Pivotal SYMON-II Sepsis Trial
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Bluejay Diagnostics ( (BJDX) ).

On April 7, 2026, Bluejay Diagnostics, Inc. reported that it has successfully enrolled 624 patients in its ongoing SYMON-II pivotal clinical trial, which is evaluating the Symphony IL-6 test for determining patient acuity in sepsis triage and monitoring in critical care settings. The trial targets 750 patients, and the company said it expects to complete enrollment within the next two to three months, noting that its inclusion and exclusion criteria have not led to significant patient exclusions.

SYMON-II is part of Bluejay’s broader SYMON clinical program, which includes pilot and pivotal studies designed to establish IL-6 levels associated with mortality and infection severity, and is intended to support a future 510(k) submission to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration. With enrollment in SYMON-II nearing completion, Bluejay signaled that it is moving closer to full clinical validation and subsequent regulatory steps for its Symphony IL-6 test, a critical path for bringing its rapid, near-patient sepsis diagnostic into the U.S. market and potentially strengthening its position in the critical care diagnostics segment.

The most recent analyst rating on (BJDX) stock is a Hold with a $2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bluejay Diagnostics stock, see the BJDX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BJDX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BJDX is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by very weak financial performance (minimal revenue, persistent losses, and significant cash burn) and a bearish technical setup (below major moving averages with negative MACD). Positive corporate progress on the Symphony IL-6 program and manufacturing readiness provides some offset, but valuation remains constrained by loss-making fundamentals and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on BJDX stock, click here.

More about Bluejay Diagnostics

Bluejay Diagnostics, Inc. is a medical diagnostics company developing the Symphony System, a cost-effective, rapid, near-patient testing platform aimed at sepsis triage and monitoring disease progression in critical care. Its lead product candidate, the Symphony IL-6 Test for sepsis, is designed to deliver accurate results in about 20 minutes to support earlier and better triage and treatment decisions, but it has not yet received U.S. regulatory clearance.

The company’s strategy centers on near-patient testing and real-time monitoring in acute care environments, positioning Symphony as a tool to help clinicians quickly assess patient severity and guide timely interventions. Bluejay must obtain authorization from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration before marketing Symphony as a diagnostic product in the United States, making successful clinical validation a key milestone for its commercialization path.

An update from Black Titan ( (BTTC) ) is now available.

On April 3, 2026, Black Titan released a research-focused update outlining how DeFi-as-a-Service and Lending-as-a-Service markets are rapidly diversifying beyond Ethereum-centric ecosystems. The note highlights rising adoption of Solana-based lending by Latin American neobanks, the growth of restaking-as-a-service for yield-hungry European and EMEA fintechs and the use of Avalanche Evergreen subnets to tokenize private credit for retail and SME access.

The company also details how global payment processors are shifting toward “yield routing” APIs that automatically deploy idle stablecoin balances into on-chain lending, signaling a convergence between digital banking and institutional DeFi. Black Titan argues that protocol monopolies are fading as prime brokers become key API gateways and projects regulatory and interoperability shifts that could reshape digital asset infrastructure for neobanks and payment firms in the coming quarters.
